rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOHN A. PHILLIPS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTs JOHN PHILLIPS, DEAN PHILLIPS and ARISTOTLE INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Motion For Sanctions GRANTED. Sanctions granted pursuant to CCP 128.5 and CCP 128.7 against Plaintiff and Plaintiff's counsel of record in the amount of $4,400. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT FARHAD ZAGHI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF PAUL GALINDO's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OFF CALENDAR. rulings.Case Title: TAMARA PEREZ VS. RONALD ARANA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line PLAINTIFF TAMARA PEREZ's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint GRANTED, first amended complaint shall be filed forthwith. Trial is continued to January 25, 2016. Discovery cut-off is accordance with the new trial date. Plaintiff shall compensate the Defendant for attorney's fees and costs (not to exceed $9,000) associated with necessary non-duplicative discovery re: new allegations within 15 days of Plaintiff presenting an itemized list of expenses. = (501/REQ - LATE TENTATIVE)

rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. SARATOGA FUND I, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-14-650242 WITH CASE CGC-14-543004
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line 10. PLAINTIFF DAMIEN QUINN's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-14-650242 WITH CASE CGC-14-543004 Continued to November 5, 2015 to be heard with the pending demurrer. If Saratoga Fund files a Memorandum to Set 650242 for trial, Quinn may file an ex-parte application to advance the hearing dates on demurrer and motion to consolidate. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EMIL MICHAEL VS. JOHN DANFORTH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Action From Unlimited To Limited
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT JOHN DANFORTH's Motion To Reclassify Action From Unlimited To Limited DENIED. Moving party failed to show with "high certainty" that a verdict in this matter will "necessarily" result in the amount below the unlimited jurisdiction. See Walker v. Sup. Ct. (1991) 53 Cal.3d 257. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BONNIE KNIGHT VS. RAND NATHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 7, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT RAND NATHAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege the time of the occurrence of material facts with certainty. Williamson v. Joyce (1902) 137 Cal.151 and Corum v. Hartford Acc & Indem. Co (1945) 67 Cal.App.2d 891. = (501/REQ)
